visual_summary: A large-scale sunken Martian garden characterized by tiered palace terraces and central botanical features. The environment is defined by dying Barsoomian flora and a sense of regal desolation as the atmosphere thins.
layout_notes: Large-scale terraced gardens featuring royal seating areas and central botanical anchors.
lighting: Shifts from peaceful prosperity to dim, suffocating shadows caused by an oxygen-depleted, hypoxic atmosphere.
mood: Heavy stillness, impending death, and hypoxic desolation.
constraints: Visuals must transition from prosperity to suffocating shadows
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific visual characteristics of the "central botanical features" are not detailed beyond their role as anchors.
